title: anthyllis hermanniae subsp. hystrix
intro: Anthyllis hermanniae subsp. hystrix, also known as 'hairy kidney vetch', is a subspecies of perennial legume native to Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Anthyllis hermanniae subsp. hystrix include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
